steps.title: Simplify the model first
steps.content: Every tile contributes $7$ square inches, so divide the whole equation by $7$: $$7g+7b=840 \quad \Rightarrow \quad g+b=120.$$ The project uses $120$ total tiles.

steps.title: Substitute the blue tiles
steps.content: The artist needs $71$ blue tiles, so set $b=71$: $$g+71=120.$$ Subtract $71$ from both sides to get $$g=49.$$

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: A quick check is $49$ green tiles plus $71$ blue tiles equals $120$ total tiles, and $120\cdot 7=840$ square inches. The answer is 49.
